untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'acceleration rate in standard deviations of recent price changes' and 'ROC of momentum shows upward inflection' — neither acceleration_rate nor ROC indicators are in the allowed list. Substituted returns (price change proxy) and macd_hist (momentum inflection proxy) as closest approximations, but original signal intent cannot be precisely captured.
translation_notes: Context-dependent direction requires separate long/short entry conditions. Used returns as proxy for acceleration rate and macd_hist crossover as proxy for momentum inflection. Volume condition uses vol_ratio_20 (20-period volume ratio). Signal requires minimum_bars_confirmed=2 but backtest engine lacks explicit bar confirmation syntax.
